archive_description: Archived accounts are hidden from the dashboard. You can restore them at any time
error_opening_balance_number: Opening balance must be a valid number
first_empty_description: Create the cash, bank, or wallet accounts you use so balances and transaction history have a real home
form_description: Set the starting balance and whether this account should count toward your headline dashboard totals
no_active_description: Restore an archived account or add a new one to keep tracking where your money lives
restore_description: This account will be added back to your active accounts and included in totals
summary_included_description: Balances that count toward dashboard totals
